title: Better Dogs X Doggy Talents Next
description: The models from Better Dogs, now in Doggy Talents Next!
body:
__**Better Dogs X Doggy Talents Next is a clientside mod. This means you can use it in any server that has Doggy Talents Next installed!**__ This mod adds all but the special dog breeds from the Better Dogs resource pack to the Doggy Talents Next mod as selectable skins.
Better Dogs X Doggy Talents Next requires the Doggy Talents Next mod to work! You can find the mod here: Modrinth: [https://modrinth.com/mod/doggy-talents-next](https://modrinth.com/mod/doggy-talents-next) Curseforge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/doggy-talents-next](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/doggy-talents-next)   ![]() Check out all the Better Dogs skins this mod adds to Doggy Talents Next here: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-dogs ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-dogs) _Note: the Better Dogs resource pack is not required for Better Dogs x Doggy Talents Next to work._    Make sure you're using Doggy Talents __Next!__ The old Doggy Talents mod won't work with Better Dogs x Doggy Talents Next.   **CREDITS** This mod was made in collaboration with the DTN dev team. * Coding and model conversion by DashieDev ダシデーブ * Coding and model conversion by MashXP ｜マッシーXP * Models and textures by Mrblueyeti
Text version of the description (how it works) 1. Put Doggy Talents Next and Better Dogs x Doggy Talents Next in your Minecraft mod folder.

2. Convert a tamed wolf into a Doggy Talents Next wolf using a training treat.

3. Right-click a Doggy Talents Next wolf with a stick.

4. Left-click the style button at the bottom of your screen.

5. Left-click the skins button at the left side of your screen.

6. Type Better Dogs in the search bar and pick a skin. Press the apply button and you're done!
